notes: Records prioritize operator-development retrieval over exhaustive whole-repository indexing.
Confidence is lower where claims are inferred from examples/tests or pass names rather than direct documentation.
Device adaptation fields added to capability_map.json, patterns.jsonl, usage_patterns.jsonl, and source_chunks.jsonl.
Device support is evidence-backed where possible; Metal/WebGPU and some advanced architecture-specific paths remain lower confidence until validated on target hardware.

SM100 TCGEN05, Stream-K GEMM, fused MoE, low-precision, sparse, DeepSeek-style, linear attention, vector/layout, and warp-specialization pattern indexes were added so every official examples/ first-level directory has at least one retrieval entry. Index records still require source/API confirmation before code generation.
